title: CodeChickenLib Unofficial 1.7.10
description:
Contains libraries for 3D math and transformations, model rendering, packets, config, colours, asm and a few other things.

Merged into CCC 1.3.0+
body:
**NOTE:CodeChickenCore Unofficial 1.3.0+ now includes CodeChickenLib and no longer needs to be installed separately**


Contains libraries for 3D math and transformations, model rendering, packets, config, colours, asm and a few other things.

 

Unofficial fork by the Gregtech New Horizons Modpack.   Required for usage of NotEnoughItems Unofficial.
